Here's the link to the original image, ya' all hornies: OUTDATED

UPDATE

Hey, I know the original image isn't the original, and that the "censored" image isn't really censored, because I didn't bother looking for everything and all that, I just didn't feel like it, It's also outdated. since I've been inactive for 2 months, i think i will not update this, for laziness or because I don't want to continue with this platform, its a mid joke bot, btw, if you haven't read my profile biography, bye
